ApprovalProcess.description: If manager of the CDI and FR request creator present in the exception list then after managers approval directly sending request to Joann.

entryCriteria.formula: TEXT(NAFTA_RequestStatus__c) = 'Submitted' && (CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T9995J4' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T6277T0' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T7930ER' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T2041BK' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T8655DP' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T7857KM' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T1245RG' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T3274J0' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T1779MM' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T0933SS' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T3976RK' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5631MA' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T0997TK' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5467EW' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T8540MF' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T0188T1' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5854CE' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T4127NI' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T7371RS' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T3085GJ' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5349RC' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T1416MM' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T0539J0' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T4893CO' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T8731CI' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T0130DL' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T1286TV' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T4880PH' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T1655TN' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T1835RC' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5295EJ' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5333GB' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T6494MW' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T4503SM' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5139AM' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T4012KT' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T7368C1' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5471PK' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T2065JG' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T0555WE' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T3569MD' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T6684WF' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T5849BM' || CC_CDIOwnerManager__c= 'T6881MH')

ApprovalProcess.label: CDI And FR Approval Based On Manager
